product.name: ArGun 260
product.familyDescriptorPl: Akryl barwiony w masie do zastosowań outdoor
product.categorySourceGroup: Durable all weather resistant solution dyed acrylic fabrics for marine applications, automotive, sun blinds, sun umbrella, outdoor furnishing.
product.specLine: 260 g/m², 100% Acrylic, All wheather resistant solution dyed outdoor fabric
descriptions: ArGun 260 is %100 acrylic solution dyed fabric for awnings, marine application, outdoor furnishing, sun umbrella, automotive and sun blinds applications. The fabric is resistant to all wheather conditions and its world's most sun resistant fabric.
It is antibacterial and water repellent.
260 g/m², 100% Acrylic, All wheather resistant solution dyed outdoor fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>1500N; Weft>1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>40N; Weft>60N | EN ISO 13937-4

evidence: categorySourceGroup: 'Durable all weather resistant solution dyed acrylic fabrics for marine applications, automotive...'
descriptions: 'ArGun 260 is 100% acrylic solution dyed fabric for awnings, marine application, outdoor furnishing, sun umbrella, automotive and sun blinds applications.'
matches.rationale: Product data explicitly states marine and automotive application use, directly supporting the transport (vehicle/vessel) application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Properties list 'hi-vis' and norms include EN ISO 20471, but there is no explicit statement of a high-visibility safety garment use; the fabric is otherwise described for awnings, marine, automotive and furnishing applications, so the hi-vis tag appears incidental rather than an intended safety-apparel application.
Awnings and sun blinds are mentioned but not explicitly framed as architectural or building-system products, so this does not meet the explicit-use threshold.
Antibacterial property is mentioned, but no healthcare or medical use is stated.
